de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava

Class ProofJavaParser.PrimarySuffixReturnValue

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava.ProofJavaParser.PrimarySuffixReturnValue
  • Enclosing class:
    ProofJavaParser

    static class ProofJavaParser.PrimarySuffixReturnValue
extends Object
    inner class that is only used to return results from primary suffix syntax rule
    Author:
    RN

      production was "."

      production was "."
